pi_items.verified_value: Synthetically generated text via Python script
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh contains a python script that writes the raw text directly

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data created by a Python script within setup_task.sh, simulating an Installation Qualification (IQ) protocol for an Agilent 1260 Infinity II HPLC. The input document is created at /home/ga/Documents/iq_protocol_raw.docx and the agent is expected to save the formatted output to /home/ga/Documents/iq_protocol_formatted.docx. The formatting instructions explicitly require the creation of exactly 8 tables: 1 Equipment Identification table, 6 verification test case tables, and 1 Acceptance Criteria Summary table.
